title: No Particles
body:
## Description
Potion effects can sometimes be a nuisance, disrupting your combat or other activities. These visual cues, while informative, can clutter your screen and make it hard to focus on the task at hand. For instance, during an intense battle, those particles might obscure your vision and hinder your reaction time. With "No Particles", you can eliminate these visual distractions entirely. This leads to a smoother and more focused gameplay experience, helping you to perform at your best without the interference of unnecessary visual effects. Whether you're exploring, fighting mobs, or engaging in intricate building projects.
# 
### Particles are present.
![Without](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c0654ea6510e531f8c317fdfd773ef5bf2cf8c8.png)
# 
### The particles have disappeared.
![With](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6be3925d32114d703c720be478212cab7aab925e.png)
